UnitAbilities.Title: Diseased Icon
UnitAbilities.Text: Melee weapons in the bearer's unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Infectious Bloodshed
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this unit makes a Charge move, until the end of the turn, weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

Infos.Title: POSSESSED
Infos.Text: For the purposes of embarking within Transports, each Death Guard Possessed model counts as one Terminator model.

UnitAbilities.Title: Chaos Lord
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Desiccation Conduit (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While an enemy unit is within Contagion Range of this model, at the end of the turn, roll one D6: on a 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

Units.Name: DEATH GUARD CHAOS LORD IN TERMINATOR ARMOUR

ModelCompositions.ModelName: Death Guard Chaos Lord in Terminator Armour

UnitAbilities.Title: Chaos Lord
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Desiccation Conduit (Aura)

Units.Name: DEATH GUARD SORCERER IN TERMINATOR ARMOUR

ModelCompositions.ModelName: Death Guard Sorcerer in Terminator Armour

UnitAbilities.Title: Putrescent Vitality (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of the Fight phase, you can roll one D6: on a 1, this Psyker’s unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 2+, until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in this Psyker’s unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

UnitAbilities.Title: Pestilent Familiar (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, after selecting targets for a Psychic weapon equipped by this model, until the end of the phase, improve the Strength and Damage characteristics of that weapon by 2.

UnitAbilities.Title: Designer’s Note
UnitAbilities.Text: Place a Pestilent Familiar token next to this model, removing it once this ability has been used.

Weapons.Name: Curse of the Leper – focused witchfire

UnitAbilities.Title: Gift of Contagion (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is Afflicted, that attack has the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Corrupted with Infection
UnitAbilities.Text: This model gains the Deadly Demise D3 ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Terminator Armour
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Toughness characteristic to 7, its Save characteristic to 2+, its Wounds characteristic to 5, and it has a 4+ invulnerable save. Add the Terminator keyword, it gains the Deep Strike ability, and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Blightlord Terminators, Deathshroud Terminators.

UnitAbilities.Title: Foul Infusion
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability. In addition, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, a Critical Hit is scored on an unmodified Hit roll of 5+, instead of only a 6.

UnitAbilities.Title: Malicious Calculations
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s Ballistic Skill or Weapon Skill characteristics and/or any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Putrefying Stink
UnitAbilities.Text: Enemy models cannot start or end an Advance move within 9" of this model.

UnitAbilities.Title: Shroud of Disease
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, that unit cannot be targeted by ranged attacks unless the attacking model is within 18".

UnitAbilities.Title: Sickening Vitality
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, add 1" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit and you can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Tainted Narthecium
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, in your Command phase, you can return 1 destroyed Bodyguard model to that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Tocsin of Misery (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: In the Battle-shock step of your opponent’s Command phase, if an enemy unit that is below its Starting Strength is within 9" of this model, that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test if it is a Psyker unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Unclean Icon
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Vector of Disease
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] and [LANCE] abilities.

UnitAbilities.Title: Gift of Poxes
UnitAbilities.Text: Add 3" to the range of this model’s Contagion Range.

UnitAbilities.Title: Corrupted with Infection
UnitAbilities.Text: This model gains the Deadly Demise D3 ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Tri-lobe Vectors
UnitAbilities.Text: In Step 2, choose up to one specialism for this unit. In Step 3, choose one unique ability for each model in this unit. In Step 4, complete this step for each model in this unit separately.

UnitAbilities.Title: Line-breaker
UnitAbilities.Text: When making ranged attacks, this model can target enemy units within Engagement Range of it with Blast weapons (provided no other friendly units are also within Engagement Range of that enemy unit). In addition, when making ranged attacks, this model does not suffer the penalty to its Hit rolls for being within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-6 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Deredeo Strike
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that is not Below Half-strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-4 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Even In Death I Serve
UnitAbilities.Text: The first time this model is destroyed, remove it from play without resolving its Deadly Demise ability. Then, at the end of the phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, set this model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with D6 wounds remaining.

UnitAbilities.Title: Duty Eternal
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time an attack is allocated to this model, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-4 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Explorator Augury Web
UnitAbilities.Text: Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield as Reinforcements cannot be set up within 12" of this bearer, but the bearer must halve its Transport Capacity.

UnitAbilities.Title: Assault Ramp
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a unit disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-5 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 12 Adeptus Astartes Infantry models. Each Jump Pack, Wulfen, Gravis, Possessed or Terminator model takes up the space of 2 models and each Centurion or Obliterator model takes up the space of 3 models.

UnitAbilities.Title: Assault Ramp
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a unit disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-5 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 12 Adeptus Astartes Infantry models. Each Jump Pack, Wulfen, Gravis, Possessed or Terminator model takes up the space of 2 models and each Centurion or Obliterator model takes up the space of 3 models.

UnitAbilities.Title: Armoured Spearhead
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets an enemy unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and, if that unit is within range of an objective marker you do not control, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-5 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Ferocious Assault
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible Monster or Vehicle unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-5 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Rotating Death
UnitAbilities.Text: This model’s Punisher rotary cannon has the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability when targeting Infantry units.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-5 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Powerful Volley
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model shoots in your Shooting phase, provided it Remained Stationary this turn, all [HEAVY] weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Pinning Bombardment
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if one or more of those attacks made with its Scorpius multi-launcher scored a hit against an enemy Infantry unit, that unit must take a Battle-shock test.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-4 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Termite Assault
UnitAbilities.Text: This model must start the battle in Reserves, but neither it nor any units embarked within it are counted towards any limits placed on the maximum number of Reserves units you can start the battle with. This model can be set up in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules. Any units embarked within this model can disembark after it has been set up on the battlefield, and if they do they must be set up more than 9" away from all enemy models.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-5 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 12 Adeptus Astartes Infantry models. It cannot transport Jump Pack, Wulfen, Phobos, Gravis, Centurion, Terminator, Obliterator, Possessed or Tacticus models (excluding Tacticus Character models that began the battle attached to a non-Tacticus unit).

UnitAbilities.Title: Interceptor
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that can Fly, add 1 to the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-4 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Armoured Resilience
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time an attack is allocated to this model, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-6 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll. Before selecting targets with this weapon, select one of its profiles to make attacks with.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 22 Adeptus Astartes Infantry models and 1 Dreadnought model. Each Jump Pack, Wulfen, Gravis, Terminator or Possessed model takes up the space of 2 models and each Centurion or Obliterator model takes up the space of 3 models.

UnitAbilities.Title: Strafing Run
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that cannot Fly, add 1 to the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-6 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Sunderer of Fortresses
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a Vehicle, improve the Strength and Damage characteristic of that attack by 1 (if that attack targets a Fortification unit, improve the Strength and Damage characteristics of that attack by 2 instead).

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-6 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Atomantic Arc-reactor
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this unit shoots its Cerberus neutron pulse array in your Shooting phase, provided it Remained Stationary this turn, that weapon has the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-6 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Assault Ramp
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a unit disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-6 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll. Before selecting targets with this weapon, select one of its profiles to make attacks with.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 28 Adeptus Astartes Infantry models. Each Jump Pack, Wulfen, Gravis, Possessed or Terminator model takes up the space of 2 models and each Centurion or Obliterator model takes up the space of 3 models.

UnitAbilities.Title: Rolling Fortress
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model from your army, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this Fellblade model, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-8 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-8 wounds remaining, subtract 4 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Titan-killer
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack with its twin Falchion volcano cannon that targets a Monster or Vehicle unit, that attack has the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-8 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-8 wounds remaining, subtract 4 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Inviolable Transport
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle round, when an attack is allocated to this model, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-10 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-10 wounds remaining, subtract 6 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 45 Adeptus Astartes Infantry models. Each Jump Pack, Wulfen, Gravis, Possessed or Terminator model takes up the space of 2 models and each Centurion or Obliterator model takes up the space of 3 models. This model can also transport up to 2 Dreadnought or Helbrute models (these models take up the space of a number of models equal to their Wounds characteristic e.g. A Dreadnought with a Wounds characteristic of 8 would take up the space of 8 models).

Units.Name: CHAOS LORD ON PALANQUIN OF NURGLE

ModelCompositions.ModelName: Chaos Lord on Palanquin of Nurgle

UnitAbilities.Title: Lord of Chaos
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can be targeted with a Stratagem for 0CP, even if another unit from your army has already been targeted with that Stratagem this phase.

UnitAbilities.Title: Revolting Regeneration
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of your Command phase, this model regains up to D3 lost wounds.

UnitAbilities.Title: Fearsome (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this unit, each time that enemy unit takes a Battle-shock or Leadership test, subtract 1 from the result.

UnitAbilities.Title: Interceptor
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that can Fly, add 1 to the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Bomb Rack
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved across during that move and roll six D6: for each 3+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-5 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Mischief Makers (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While an enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) is within 6" of this unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Gift of Poxes (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Feculent Despair (Aura, Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this model, each time that unit takes a Battle-shock test, subtract 1 from that test.
